explanation:
The structured natural language translates 'Exceeding sensor limits shall latch an autopilot pullup when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail).'

Decision2 captures the condition under which the action should take place, specifically 'when the pilot is not in control (not standby) and the system is supported without failures (not apfail).'
Decision3 indicates that the autopilot should latch into a pullup mode immediately when the conditions are met.

decision3_substring: shall latch an autopilot pullup
